_comment: FROZEN, PRE-REGISTERED adversarial scenario bank (design 41 §2A, commission 44 C). 12 archetypes = 8 conflict : 4 control. Each scenario: seed (byte-identical regeneration), names (factor overrides that force the conflict), filler (realistic non-toy padding), claim (ONE machine-checkable pass condition), and a prose note (why this is the correct answer). The 'correct answer' encodes design intent; Kairos agreeing proves she reasons as designed — it does NOT prove the design is profitable (that is the forward loop alone). Adding a scenario is a LOGGED change, never an edit to bend a result.

scenarios.note: Strong fundamentals + deep dislocation the FORMULA loves (high mechanical_rank), BUT E3=knife + E1=0.02 (still falling, no base). Must NOT top — a clean-basing name with weaker fundamentals should rank above it. The LEU/entry-trigger lesson: great company, wrong moment.
Excellent fundamentals + excellent macro BUT survival_gate=0.30 (floor). Must appear in gated_out, NOT in ranking at all — the hard survival exclusion holds under maximal fundamental temptation.
Great fundamentals, survival_gate=0.38 (ABOVE floor so rankable) + pre_revenue branch. The hard gate can't catch it — pure judgment. Must be demoted vs a healthier name; NOT gated, but NOT top-3.

Three names sharing one invented theme (orbital_compute), all strong individually → formula puts all three high. Must NOT all sit in top-3; at least one demoted with a cluster_warnings/correlation_note naming them as one bet.
Two near-identical strong names; A (E1=0.05, basing) has room, B (E1=0.97, recovering) has its bounce spent. A must rank above B with a rationale citing E1. The core 'deployable now' discrimination.
POSITIVE CONTROL. Strong-but-not-extreme fundamentals + E1=0.10 + basing + hot catalyst + healthy gate. Must be top-3 (ideally #1) — judgment recognises the asymmetric setup it's built to find.
Two equal names; one has a hot dated catalyst (<=14d), the other cold/est. Hot must rank above cold with a rationale citing E2. Catalyst-proximity weighting.

NEGATIVE CONTROL. A clean universe where the mechanical order is already correct (factors don't conflict). Kairos's order must stay close to mechanical — she doesn't override for the sake of it. Claim: the formula's #1 (top mechanical) stays in top-3.

An un-themed screen name (macro 0.40) with excellent timing vs a themed name with poor timing. If screen ranks above themed, the rationale must say why. Pass = correct order with the screen-over-themed discipline.
CONTROL / sanity floor. A realistic spread, no single dominant trap. No catastrophic error: no gated name ranked, no invented ticker, schema valid, not all-LOW. The harness isn't only trap-hunting.

Faithful synthetic reconstruction of the actual LEU miss: cheap floor, +move already spent (E1=0.95), catalyst 0.00, recovering. Must NOT top; rationale must cite spent-entry + absent catalyst. Direct replay of the failure that motivated Layer 2.

A gated value-trap AND a knife in the same universe, both with seductive headline factors. Neither tops; gated one excluded, knife demoted; a clean filler name tops. Judgment under MULTIPLE simultaneous conflicts. Claim checks the knife stays out of top-3 (gated is structurally excluded too).
